warnings: ⟳ 129 chronic reopeners (reopened 2+ times). These keep bouncing — fix properly or wontfix. Run: `desloppify show --chronic` to see them.

security.summary: Security coverage complete for enabled detectors.

narrative.headline: All T1 and T2 items cleared!

actions.description: 6 flat_dirs findings — create subdirectories and use `desloppify move`
19 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
1 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
5 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
33 signature findings — consolidate inconsistent function signatures
31 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
49 unused findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
182 files need design review — run design review with dimension templates

strategy.hint: 3 independent workstreams, safe to parallelize. Rescan after each phase to verify.

narrative.milestone: All T1 and T2 items cleared!

reminders.message: ALWAYS share ALL scores with the user: overall, objective, and strict, plus every dimension score (lenient + strict), including subjective dimensions. The goal is to maximize strict scores.
